user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set the deadline for employees to declare investment details as days after the start of the financial year, so that declarations are collected within a controlled window
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Tax Planning Configuration screen; When I enter the number of days after starting of the financial year and click Save; Then the declaration deadline is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure a reminder for employees to declare investment details before the due date, so that employees are prompted in time
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Tax Planning Configuration screen; When I enter the number of days of due date for the declaration reminder and Save; Then the reminder setting is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set how many days from date of joining a new joinee can declare investment details, so that new hires have a fair declaration window
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Tax Planning Configuration screen; When I enter the number of days from date of joining and Save; Then the new joinee declaration window is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set when employees can submit investment proofs as days before end of financial year, so that proof submission opens at the right time
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Tax Planning Configuration screen; When I enter the days before end of financial year for submission and Save; Then the submission start setting is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set the due day and reminder for submitting investment details before end of financial year, so that proof submission is completed on time
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Tax Planning Configuration screen; When I set the due days before end of financial year and the reminder days of due date and Save; Then the submission due date and reminder are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to assign applicable locations and employee classes using the transfer controls, so that tax planning applies only to the relevant employees
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Tax Planning Configuration screen; When I move locations and employee classes using the >>, >, < and << controls and Save; Then the applicable locations and employee classes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save the configuration and proceed to the next step, so that I can complete the tax planning setup in sequence
acceptance_criteria: Given I have completed the configuration fields; When I click Save & Next; Then the settings are saved and I advance to the next screen
